summary: EC3 frontend-only regression testing completed. Verified functional Quote line-item and Order-item editors (quick + detailed), manual override reason validation (client + backend enforced), production_required category defaults and override, expired-quote convert-with-override UX, revision warning dialog on sent quotes, source-quote link + revision pill on Orders, convert idempotency, sidebar nav + notification bell, backend-authoritative totals. All EC3 acceptance criteria pass except one minor loading-state issue on /quotes/{invalid-id}.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigating to /quotes/nonexistent-id (and /orders/nonexistent-id) does NOT render the [data-testid="quote-error"] / [data-testid="order-error"] state. Page stays stuck on 'Loading quote…' / 'Loading order…' indefinitely. Root cause is likely react-query default retry (3x + backoff) meaning isError is not true within the observation window, plus the id may pass 404 which react-query keeps retrying. Recommend disabling retry for 4xx or explicitly rendering error after a short retry budget.

passed_tests: Quotes list: empty state + create button visible
Create quote via dialog with customer + job name
Quote detail page loads with 'Line items' as default tab, Add item button visible
Detailed add: banners category, 24x36, qty 2, $25 → server derived $50 total matches quote-derived-total
Quick mode add: description + qty + $15 → server totals updated
Edit unit price WITHOUT override reason → dialog stays open, toast 'Override reason is required...' shown; supplying reason saves successfully
Delete line item via trash icon: row removed, totals refresh
Mark quote 'sent', click Add item → revision-warning-dialog appears; confirm → LineItemDialog opens
Convert to order (non-expired): confirm without reason navigates to /orders/{id} with success toast
Order detail: order-source-quote-link (Q-1) and order-source-quote-revision (rev #1) both visible
Convert idempotency: returning to converted quote shows quote-open-order button; quote-convert-button hidden (after cache refresh, status=Converted pill)
Expired quote: setting expires_at=2020-01-01 shows expired badge; convert dialog requires override reason; confirm button disabled until reason entered; then converts successfully
Orders list: new order dialog, creation flow, row appears
New order detail: order-items-empty state + BOTH order-item-quick-add and order-item-detailed-add buttons visible
Services category → production switch defaults OFF (aria-checked=false); item saved shows 'no' production pill; total $50 for qty 1 x $50
Rigid_signs category → production defaults ON; qty 3 x $10 = $30 server-derived; total $80 across items
Edit rigid_signs item toggling production OFF WITHOUT reason → validation toast 'Production-required override reason is required', dialog stays open; supplying reason saves and pill updates
Backend authoritative totals: frontend estimate matches server-derived line_total_cents after save
Sidebar navigation: Home / Shop Operations / Business & Finance / Team & Workflow / Creative Studio / Control Center / Help & Community all visible
NotificationBell renders top-right without console errors
action_items: MEDIUM: Make /quotes/{invalid-id} and /orders/{invalid-id} render the [data-testid=quote-error] / [data-testid=order-error] state promptly (disable react-query retries on 4xx or catch 404 and treat as isError=true so the friendly error string surfaces). Currently the pages hang on the loading indicator.

LOW/observation: A transient React DOM error ('Failed to execute insertBefore on Node...') was captured once during rapid AlertDialog+LineItemDialog interactions triggered by Escape key + programmatic toast removal. Not reproducible during normal user flow; likely a Radix portal/animation race. Only worth investigating if users report the page blanking after cancelling a revision dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderDetailPage: 'from Quote Q-…' link uses (order.source_quote_id || order.quote_id) — good defensive fallback. Rev pill only shown when source_quote_revision != null — correct.

LineItemDialog: client-side override_reason validation is correct but relies on !initial?.manual_override_reason to skip re-prompt. If the initial item already had a saved reason, editing the price again would silently pass without a new reason on the frontend — server should still enforce.
QuoteDetailPage/LineItemsPanel: guardOrRun triggers revision-warning-dialog for any status !== 'draft'. This is correct per EC3.
MoneyInput fill via playwright requires an explicit blur (Tab key) to commit cents value; unit tests / manual UX unaffected but worth documenting.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (20/21 scenarios pass; only invalid-id error state not surfacing)

seed_data_creation: Created customer 'EC3 Cust <ts>' via /customers page; created 3 quotes (Q-1 draft→converted, Q-2 expired-sent→converted, Q-… interim) and 2 orders (O-1, O-2, O-3).
context_for_next_testing_agent: EC3 flows are functional. Main outstanding item is the loading-vs-error state for nonexistent detail routes — a small change in react-query options (retry: false on 404) or explicit 404 handling in the fetcher will fix it.
rca of the issue: Loading-forever on /quotes/nonexistent-id: QuoteDetailPage uses useQuery with the default retry policy (retry: 3, exponentialBackoff). For a 404 the request keeps retrying, so isError stays false for tens of seconds and the loading string persists. Same pattern on OrderDetailPage. Fix: add `retry: (failureCount, err) => err?.response?.status < 400 || err?.response?.status >= 500 ? failureCount < 3 : false` (or globally in the QueryClient defaultOptions) so 4xx responses immediately propagate isError=true and render the friendly [data-testid="quote-error"] / [data-testid="order-error"] element.
